scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 904509930 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 Proxy-Authorization: Digest username="33982126232",realm="213.152.17.108",nonce="5a02d0e28074b601bf3d17eca645ad8dffdd34c2",response="ae0f13c53790bf0be380d288fe1fa2b6",uri="sip:0607617122@10.69.69.194",algorithm=MD5,qop=auth,nc=00000004,cnonce="d261fb2e8b3784ffa525" Supported: timer User-Agent: IP Office 10.1.0.0.0 build 237 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=UserA 711462316 843249914 IN IP4 10.69.69.190 s=Session SDP c=IN IP4 10.69.69.190 t=0 0 m=audio 40768 RTP/AVP 0 8 18 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 904509930 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 904509931 INVITE Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 Proxy-Authorization: Digest username="33982126232",realm="213.152.17.108",nonce="5a02d7116139eb992ffb66da730bf04096cb0676",response="541aa726f35979763c46020739da95f2",uri="sip:0607617122@10.69.69.194",algorithm=MD5,qop=auth,nc=00000001,cnonce="1d9a3e44837e54fe9e64" Supported: timer User-Agent: IP Office 10.1.0.0.0 build 237 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 904509931 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: IP Office 10.1.0.0.0 build 237 [routes] Content-Length: 0
